overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage depicting a first-person walk through a moody, foggy moorland at night. The camera moves steadily through rocky terrain and grassy paths, passing ancient stone walls and approaching illuminated ruins under a dramatic cloudy sky.

events.description: passing the warm lantern light illuminating the rocky path on the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow rocky defile toward a distant light source

large dark rock formation forming the right wall of the canyon
warm orange lantern light visible between the rocks ahead
purple flowering plants growing along the rocky path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow rocky canyon at night, with large stone formations flanking both sides of a dirt path. A warm lantern glows in the distance between the rocks, guiding the way forward. Purple heather flowers dot the terrain as the camera moves steadily through the enclosed passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: open moorland with stone fences and distant ruins

events.description: exiting the rocky canyon into open grassland with expansive sky view
low stone walls become visible along the path sides

agents.ego_description: walking across open moorland toward distant stone ruins on a hill

entered.detail: low stone wall running along the left side of the path
ancient stone structures visible on the hillside ahead
scattered evergreen trees silhouetted against the night sky

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the rocky canyon, the scene opens into a wide moorland under a cloudy night sky. Low stone fences line the grassy path as ancient stone ruins become visible on the distant hillside. The terrain is dotted with purple heather and scattered pine trees as the camera advances toward the hilltop structures.

events.description: warm lantern light becomes visible near the ruin entrance ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along a walled path approaching the stone settlement entrance

entered.detail: tall ancient stone wall forming the right boundary of the path
lit lantern post marking the entrance to the stone ruins

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows a dirt path flanked by high stone walls as the camera approaches the ancient ruins. The stone structures loom larger, filling the frame as the camera draws near. A warm lantern glow appears on the left, marking the entrance to the settlement, while the path leads directly toward the imposing stone architecture ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined rocky canyon into an expansive moorland that culminates at the entrance of an ancient stone settlement. It begins within a narrow passage flanked by large stone formations and purple heather, guided forward by the distant glow of a warm lantern. As the camera emerges from the canyon, the environment opens into a wide, cloudy night landscape where low stone fences and scattered pine trees lead toward ruins on a distant hillside. The scene then shifts as the path narrows again between high stone walls, bringing the imposing architecture of the ruins into full view. Finally, the camera draws near to the settlement, passing a lantern on the left that marks the entrance to the looming stone structures ahead.
